New Summary statistics for the difference scores: \[M_D = {-5.14}, \quad \Sigma{D} = {-36}, \quad \Sigma{D^2} = {1510}\] 
Calculate SS of the difference scores  \[SS_D = \Sigma D^2 - \frac{(\Sigma D)^2}{n}\]  \[SS_D = {1510} - \frac{1296}{7}\]  \[SS_D = {1510} - {185.14}\]  \[SS_D = {1324.86}\] 
Calculate the variance of the difference scores  \[s_D^2 = \frac{SS_D}{df}\]  \[s_D^2 = \frac{1324.86}{6}\]  \[s_D^2 = {220.81}\] 
Calculate the estimated standard error of the difference scores  \[s_{M_D} = \sqrt{\frac{s^2}{n}}\]  \[s_{M_D} = \sqrt{\frac{220.81}{7}}\]  \[s_{M_D} = \sqrt{31.54}\]  \[s_{M_D} = {5.62}\] 
Calculate \(t_{obt}\)  \[t_{obt} = {\frac{M_D - \mu_D}{s_{M_D}}}\]  \[t_{obt} = \frac{-5.14 - 0}{5.62}\]  \[t_{obt} = \frac{-5.14}{5.62}\]  \[t_{obt} = {-0.91}\] 
Calculating Cohen’s d  \[d = \frac{M_D}{\sqrt{s^2}}\]  \[d = \frac{-5.14}{{{\sqrt{220.81}}}}\]  \[d = \frac{-5.14}{14.86}\]  \[d = {-0.35}\] 
The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  t(6) = -0.91, p > 0.05, d = -0.35

Calculate the estimated standard error of the difference scores  \[s_{M_D} = \sqrt{\frac{s^2}{n}}\]  \[s_{M_D} = \sqrt{\frac{31.9}{6}}\]  \[s_{M_D} = \sqrt{5.32}\]  \[s_{M_D} = {2.31}\] 
Calculate \(t_{obt}\)  \[t_{obt} = {\frac{M_D - \mu_D}{s_{M_D}}}\]  \[t_{obt} = \frac{7.5 - 0}{2.31}\]  \[t_{obt} = \frac{7.5}{2.31}\]  \[t_{obt} = {3.25}\] 
Calculating Cohen’s d  \[d = \frac{M_D}{\sqrt{s^2}}\]  \[d = \frac{7.5}{{{\sqrt{31.9}}}}\]  \[d = \frac{7.5}{5.65}\]  \[d = {1.33}\] 
The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  t(5) = 3.25, p < 0.05, d = 1.33

Summary statistics for these data: \(G = {2296} \quad \Sigma X^2 = {122394} \quad k = {4} \quad N = {44}\) 
\(T_{A} = {467} \quad SS_{A} = {180.73}\)  \(T_{B} = {656} \quad SS_{B} = {106.55}\)  \(T_{C} = {628} \quad SS_{C} = {134.91}\)  \(T_{D} = {545} \quad SS_{D} = {168.73}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_A = \mu_B = \mu_C = \mu_D\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.51}, \alpha = {0.01}\) 
Stage 1 Calculations:  Calculate the Degrees of Freedom  \[df_{total} = N - 1\]  \[df_{total} = {44} - 1\]  \[df_{total} = {43}\]  \[df_{between} = k - 1\]  \[df_{between} = {4} - 1\]  \[df_{between} = {3}\]  \[df_{within} = N - K\]  \[df_{within} = {44} - {4}\]  \[df_{within} = {40}\] 
Calculate the Sum of Squares  \[SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\]  \[SS_{total} = {122394} - \frac{2296^2}{44}\]  \[SS_{total} = {122394} - \frac{5271616}{44}\]  \[SS_{total} = {122394} - {119809.45}\]  \[SS_{total} = {2584.55}\]  \[SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\]  \[SS_{within} = {180.73 + 106.55 + 134.91 + 168.73}\]  \[SS_{within} = {590.92}\]  \[SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\]  \[SS_{between} = {2584.55} - {590.92}\]  \[SS_{between} = {1993.63}\]  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \[SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\] 
Stage 2 Calculations:  Partition the Degrees of Freedom  \[df_{subjects} = n - 1\]  \[df_{subjects} = {11} - 1\]  \[df_{subjects} = {10}\]  \[df_{error} = df_{within} - df_{subjects}\]  \[df_{error} = {40} - {10}\]  \[df_{error} = {30}\]

\[SS_{subjects} = \Sigma{\frac{P^2}{k}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {\frac{205^2}{4} + \frac{223^2}{4} + \frac{213^2}{4} + \frac{213^2}{4} + \frac{197^2}{4} + \frac{215^2}{4} + \frac{216^2}{4} + \frac{203^2}{4} + \frac{200^2}{4} + \frac{203^2}{4} + \frac{208^2}{4}} - \frac{2296^2}{44}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {\frac{42025}{4} + \frac{49729}{4} + \frac{45369}{4} + \frac{45369}{4} + \frac{38809}{4} + \frac{46225}{4} + \frac{46656}{4} + \frac{41209}{4} + \frac{40000}{4} + \frac{41209}{4} + \frac{43264}{4}} - \frac{5271616}{44}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {{10506.25} + {12432.25} + {11342.25} + {11342.25} + {9702.25} + {11556.25} + {11664.0} + {10302.25} + {10000.0} + {10302.25} + {10816.0}} - {119809.45}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {119966.0} - {119809.45}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {156.55}\]  \[SS_{error} = SS_{within} - SS_{subjects}\]  \[SS_{error} = {590.92} - {156.55}\]  \[SS_{error} = {434.37}\] 
Calculate the Mean Squares  \[MS_{between} = \frac{SS_{between}}{df_{between}}\]  \[MS_{between} = \frac{1993.63}{3}\]  \[MS_{between} = {664.54}\] 
\[MS_{error} = \frac{SS_{error}}{df_{error}}\]  \[MS_{error} = \frac{434.37}{30}\]  \[MS_{error} = {14.48}\] 
Calculate the F-Ratio  \[F_{obt} = \frac{MS_{between}}{MS_{error}}\]  \[F_{obt} = \frac{664.54}{14.48}\]  \[F_{obt} = {45.89}\] 
Calculate \(\eta^2\)  \[\eta_p^2 = \frac{SS{between}}{SS_{total} - SS_{subjects}}\]  \[\eta_p^2 = \frac{1993.63}{{2584.55} - {156.55}}\]  \[\eta_p^2 = \frac{1993.63}{2428.0}\]  \[\eta_p^2 = {0.82}\] 
The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({3}, {30}) = {45.89}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.82}\)

Calculate \(\eta^2\)  \[\eta_p^2 = \frac{SS{between}}{SS_{total} - SS_{subjects}}\]  \[\eta_p^2 = \frac{174.12}{{349.11} - {54.43}}\]  \[\eta_p^2 = \frac{174.12}{294.68}\]  \[\eta_p^2 = {0.59}\] 
The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {10}) = {7.22}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.59}\)

\(T_{A} = {509} \quad SS_{A} = {505.21}\)  \(T_{B} = {701} \quad SS_{B} = {276.93}\)  \(T_{C} = {580} \quad SS_{C} = {391.43}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_A = \mu_B = \mu_C\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.53}, \alpha = {0.01}\) 
Stage 1 Calculations:  Calculate the Degrees of Freedom  \[df_{total} = N - 1\]  \[df_{total} = {42} - 1\]  \[df_{total} = {41}\]  \[df_{between} = k - 1\]  \[df_{between} = {3} - 1\]  \[df_{between} = {2}\]  \[df_{within} = N - K\]  \[df_{within} = {42} - {3}\]  \[df_{within} = {39}\] 
Calculate the Sum of Squares  \[SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\]  \[SS_{total} = {78808} - \frac{1790^2}{42}\]  \[SS_{total} = {78808} - \frac{3204100}{42}\]  \[SS_{total} = {78808} - {76288.1}\]  \[SS_{total} = {2519.9}\]  \[SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\]  \[SS_{within} = {505.21 + 276.93 + 391.43}\]  \[SS_{within} = {1173.57}\]  \[SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\]  \[SS_{between} = {2519.9} - {1173.57}\]  \[SS_{between} = {1346.33}\]  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \[SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\] 
Stage 2 Calculations:  Partition the Degrees of Freedom  \[df_{subjects} = n - 1\]  \[df_{subjects} = {14} - 1\]  \[df_{subjects} = {13}\]  \[df_{error} = df_{within} - df_{subjects}\]  \[df_{error} = {39} - {13}\]  \[df_{error} = {26}\]

\[SS_{subjects} = \Sigma{\frac{P^2}{k}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {\frac{131^2}{3} + \frac{115^2}{3} + \frac{128^2}{3} + \frac{129^2}{3} + \frac{135^2}{3} + \frac{120^2}{3} + \frac{121^2}{3} + \frac{137^2}{3} + \frac{137^2}{3} + \frac{130^2}{3} + \frac{138^2}{3} + \frac{130^2}{3} + \frac{128^2}{3} + \frac{111^2}{3}} - \frac{1790^2}{42}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {\frac{17161}{3} + \frac{13225}{3} + \frac{16384}{3} + \frac{16641}{3} + \frac{18225}{3} + \frac{14400}{3} + \frac{14641}{3} + \frac{18769}{3} + \frac{18769}{3} + \frac{16900}{3} + \frac{19044}{3} + \frac{16900}{3} + \frac{16384}{3} + \frac{12321}{3}} - \frac{3204100}{42}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {{5720.33} + {4408.33} + {5461.33} + {5547.0} + {6075.0} + {4800.0} + {4880.33} + {6256.33} + {6256.33} + {5633.33} + {6348.0} + {5633.33} + {5461.33} + {4107.0}} - {76288.1}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {76587.97} - {76288.1}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {299.87}\]  \[SS_{error} = SS_{within} - SS_{subjects}\]  \[SS_{error} = {1173.57} - {299.87}\]  \[SS_{error} = {873.7}\] 
Calculate the Mean Squares  \[MS_{between} = \frac{SS_{between}}{df_{between}}\]  \[MS_{between} = \frac{1346.33}{2}\]  \[MS_{between} = {673.16}\] 
\[MS_{error} = \frac{SS_{error}}{df_{error}}\]  \[MS_{error} = \frac{873.7}{26}\]  \[MS_{error} = {33.6}\] 
Calculate the F-Ratio  \[F_{obt} = \frac{MS_{between}}{MS_{error}}\]  \[F_{obt} = \frac{673.16}{33.6}\]  \[F_{obt} = {20.03}\] 
Calculate \(\eta^2\)  \[\eta_p^2 = \frac{SS{between}}{SS_{total} - SS_{subjects}}\]  \[\eta_p^2 = \frac{1346.33}{{2519.9} - {299.87}}\]  \[\eta_p^2 = \frac{1346.33}{2220.03}\]  \[\eta_p^2 = {0.61}\] 
The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {26}) = {20.03}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.61}\)

Stage 1 Calculations:  Calculate the Degrees of Freedom  \[df_{total} = N - 1\]  \[df_{total} = {20} - 1\]  \[df_{total} = {19}\]  \[df_{between} = k - 1\]  \[df_{between} = {4} - 1\]  \[df_{between} = {3}\]  \[df_{within} = N - K\]  \[df_{within} = {20} - {4}\]  \[df_{within} = {16}\] 
Calculate the Sum of Squares  \[SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\]  \[SS_{total} = {60721} - \frac{1065^2}{20}\]  \[SS_{total} = {60721} - \frac{1134225}{20}\]  \[SS_{total} = {60721} - {56711.25}\]  \[SS_{total} = {4009.75}\]  \[SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\]  \[SS_{within} = {370.0 + 134.8 + 1165.2 + 254.8}\]  \[SS_{within} = {1924.8}\]  \[SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\]  \[SS_{between} = {4009.75} - {1924.8}\]  \[SS_{between} = {2084.95}\]  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \[SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\] 
Stage 2 Calculations:  Partition the Degrees of Freedom  \[df_{subjects} = n - 1\]  \[df_{subjects} = {5} - 1\]  \[df_{subjects} = {4}\]  \[df_{error} = df_{within} - df_{subjects}\]  \[df_{error} = {16} - {4}\]  \[df_{error} = {12}\]

\[SS_{subjects} = \Sigma{\frac{P^2}{k}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {\frac{233^2}{4} + \frac{209^2}{4} + \frac{183^2}{4} + \frac{245^2}{4} + \frac{195^2}{4}} - \frac{1065^2}{20}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {\frac{54289}{4} + \frac{43681}{4} + \frac{33489}{4} + \frac{60025}{4} + \frac{38025}{4}} - \frac{1134225}{20}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {{13572.25} + {10920.25} + {8372.25} + {15006.25} + {9506.25}} - {56711.25}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {57377.25} - {56711.25}\]  \[SS_{subjects} = {666.0}\]  \[SS_{error} = SS_{within} - SS_{subjects}\]  \[SS_{error} = {1924.8} - {666.0}\]  \[SS_{error} = {1258.8}\] 
Calculate the Mean Squares  \[MS_{between} = \frac{SS_{between}}{df_{between}}\]  \[MS_{between} = \frac{2084.95}{3}\]  \[MS_{between} = {694.98}\] 
\[MS_{error} = \frac{SS_{error}}{df_{error}}\]  \[MS_{error} = \frac{1258.8}{12}\]  \[MS_{error} = {104.9}\] 
Calculate the F-Ratio  \[F_{obt} = \frac{MS_{between}}{MS_{error}}\]  \[F_{obt} = \frac{694.98}{104.9}\]  \[F_{obt} = {6.63}\] 
Calculate \(\eta^2\)  \[\eta_p^2 = \frac{SS{between}}{SS_{total} - SS_{subjects}}\]  \[\eta_p^2 = \frac{2084.95}{{4009.75} - {666.0}}\]  \[\eta_p^2 = \frac{2084.95}{3343.75}\]  \[\eta_p^2 = {0.62}\]
